notes: Elite Fourum community study, n=2736 packs (95% CI): V 12.65% (1/7.91), VMAX 3.40% (1/29.42), ultra rare 3.76% (1/26.56), rainbow rare 1.50% (1/66.73), secret rare 0.95% (1/105.23). Holo rare rate (1/5.7) from ThePriceDex community aggregate; residual mass on non-holo rare. All hits modeled in the rare slot; reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. ETB SWSH era = 8 packs.
